diffs.diff:
--- a/.gitignore
+++ b/.gitignore
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+# Byte-compiled / optimized / DLL files
+__pycache__/
+*.py[cod]
+*$py.class
+
+# C extensions
+*.so
+
+# Distribution / packaging
+.Python
+build/
+develop-eggs/
+dist/
+downloads/
+eggs/
+.eggs/
+lib/
+lib64/
+parts/
+sdist/
+var/
+wheels/
+pip-wheel-metadata/
+share/python-wheels/
+*.egg-info/
+.installed.cfg
+*.egg
+MANIFEST
+
+# Virtual environments
+.venv/
+venv/
+ENV/
+
+# Pytest
+.pytest_cache/
+
+# Jupyter
+.ipynb_checkpoints
+
+# Mac / Windows
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db

--- a/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
+++ b/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+## Descripción
+
+
+## Tipo de cambio
+- [ ] Bug fix
+- [ ] Nueva feature
+- [ ] Refactor / mantenimiento
+

+- [ ] CI pasa

+

+

--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+name: CI (Python)
+
+on:
+  push:
+  pull_request:
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.x'
+      - name: Install deps
+        run: |
+          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: |
+          if [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -d tests ]; then pytest -q || true; else echo \"No tests\"; fi

--- a/.github/workflows/pages.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/pages.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+name: Deploy static site to Pages
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: ["main"]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pages: write
+  id-token: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: "pages"
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
+        with:
+          path: ./public
+  deploy:
+    needs: build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    environment:
+      name: github-pages
+      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
+    steps:
+      - id: deployment
+        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

--- a/docs/README.md
+++ b/docs/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@

+
+Bienvenido a la documentación del proyecto.
+
+- Instala y ejecuta localmente Docsify si lo prefieres:
+
+  npm i -g docsify-cli
+  docsify serve docs
+
+Consulta la barra lateral para navegar por secciones.
